subcodes.first_line: The Book from Our presence is for him who hath turned unto the horizon of the Cause, whilst every remote and ignorant one hath turned away therefrom. The Ancient King beareth witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن اقبل الی افق الامر اذ اعرض عنه کل جاهل بعید یشهد مالک القدم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God
